summary: Implemented the six generator-scaffolded novel-command stubs (gate, open-advice, history, diff, compare, batch) with real logic, plus pp:no-error-path-probe annotations.
reason: The generator emits TODO stubs for novel_features; the transcendence logic is hand-built on the local scan store, and the scan API returns 200+siteError for any URL so these commands opt out of the dogfood error-path probe.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli (incl. seeded-store behavior tests) and full live dogfood pass.
